entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the crop studied for resistance to midge and leaf diseases

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: Stenodiplosis sorghicola, a pest that affects sorghum

entities.name: LEAF DISEASES
entities.description: A group of diseases affecting the leaves of sorghum

entities.name: ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: A leaf disease caused by Colletotrichum graminicola

entities.name: COLLETRICHUM GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes anthracnose

entities.name: ZONATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A leaf disease caused by Gloeocercospora sorghi

entities.name: GLOEOCERCOSPORA SORGHI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes zonate leaf spot

entities.name: LEAF BLIGHT
entities.description: A leaf disease caused by Exserohilum turcicum

entities.name: EXSEROHILUM TURCICUM
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes leaf blight

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A leaf disease caused by Puccinia purpurea

entities.name: PUCCINIA PURPUREA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO MIDGE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist infestation by sorghum midge

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO LEAF DISEASES
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist various leaf diseases

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the experiment was conducted in 1994

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where some genotypes were previously identified as resistant

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The genetic mechanism governing the inheritance of resistance to midge

entities.name: DOMINANT INHERITANCE
entities.description: The genetic mechanism governing the inheritance of resistance to some leaf diseases

entities.name: CMS LINES
entities.description: Cytoplasmic male sterile lines used as female parents in the study

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Genotypes used to restore fertility in CMS lines
